originalTitle: DR Congo v Uzbekistan: World Cup 2026 – live
summary: Minute-by-minute report: Will DR Congo or Uzbekistan manage their first win of the World Cup? Join Bryan Graham for the latest news
content: 90+2 min (Shortly before the goal, the fourth official signaled for eight minutes of added time.) And there’s the dagger! Wissa curls a shot from just outside the area past the keeper into the far corner. Surely DR Congo are through to the last 32 now! The whole team is down by the corner flag celebrating and hoisting the man in the No 20 shirt into the air. What scenes! 87 min DR Congo have dominated possession as well as the chances since half-time and they’ve shown no sign of letting up in the final minutes. 85 min Interestingly enough, as things stand, DR Congo’s last-32 game would be right back here in Atlanta on Wednesday against … England. 83 min DR Congo also make their final switch, inserting Joris Kayembe for Arthur Masuaku. 82 min Uzbekistan make their final two subs: Igor Sergeev and Jamshid Iskanderov come on for Akmal Mozgovoy and Jakhongir Urozov. 79 min That was gorgeous finish by Fiston Mayele, who flicks in a shot attempt by Elia past the Uzbekistan keeper. Can they hold on for another 10 minutes to punch their ticket for the last 32? DR Congo have scored a second goal in 10 minutes and the knockout stage is within touching distance! 75 min With a quarter hour to go, DR Congo are outshooting Uzbekistan by a 12-3 margin with a 2-1 edge in shots on target. 74 min And for Uzbekistan: Oston Urunov is on for Abbosbek Fayzullaev. 73 min Three substitutions for DR Congo: Ngal’ayel Mukau, Théo Bongonda and Meschack Elia come on for Samuel Moutoussamy, Brian Cipenga and Nathanaël Mbuku. 70 min We’re into the second-half match break. Wissa calmly slots it inside the right post as the keeper lunges in the opposite direction. The Conogolese fans in the Atlanta Stadium stands are in delirium as they have leveled the score and their knockout stage dreams are very much alive! 66 min Wissa is tripped in the area and the referee immediately points to the spot. It’s a penalty for DR Congo! 65 min It looks like a wave of substitutions is coming at the forthcoming hydration break. 62 min The chances are finally coming for DR Congo. Shortly after Nematov turns away Mbuku shot attempt, Wissa directs a header directly into the keeper’s hands. Moutoussamy then goes into the book with a yellow for a clattering challenge on Mozgovoy. 59 min Two substitutions for Uzbekistan at the hour mark. Aziz G’aniev is on for Dostonbek Khamdamov, while Odiljon Khamrobekov replaces Otabek Shukurov. 55 min Mozgovoy is down after a collision with Mbemba. It takes him an awfully long time to make his way off the pitch, much to the outcry of the DR Congo players, who believe he’s already burning the clock. 54 min Shomurodov tries another cheeky chip but it sails over the crossbar. Surely it pays to try after that first wonder goal. 52 min DR Congo make the first substitution of the night as Fiston Mayele comes on for Cédric Bakambu. 50 min Sadiki finds Wissa in the center of the area and in ample space but his attempt on goal is far wide. He’s got to do better there. 48 min Nasrullaev is shown yellow for grabbing a handful of a DR Congo player’s shirt and giving it a yank in full view of the referee. 46 min And we’re off in the second half. DR Congo are staring at a group-stage exit after Shomurodov’s clipped finish gave Uzbekistan a 1-0 half-time lead, despite Mbuku having a brilliant equaliser ruled out by VAR. The players are back out on the pitch and we should be under way for the second half momentarily. Meanwhile, here’s what’s happening down the road at Hard Rock Stadium. There’s the whistle and the sides head to the locker room with Uzbekistan enjoying a lead in a World Cup match for the first time in their history. 45 min+5 Mbuku is shown yellow for a foul on Fayzullaev right before the half-time whistle. 45 min+4 DR Congo win a free-kick from about 30 yards. Mbemba meets the half-cleared delivery himself inside the area, but the captain slices wide. 45 min The fourth official signals for a minimum of seven minutes of added time. 43 min DR Congo raise the tempo before half-time and win a corner, but Nematov punches it clear. 42 min No serious chances for either side since the disallowed goal. Things have quieted a bit as half-time draws near. Khusanov is shown a hard challenge. 39 min Shomurodov thwarts a DR Congo chance but it grazes his hand and he’s whistled for a hand-ball. Free-kick for the DR Congo that comes to nothing. 36 min Cipenga is down in a heap after a shove from Alijonov, which appeared clean. But after a short pause in the action we’re back under way with a goal kick. 33 min Uzbekistan are taking the sting out of it now, with Shukurov dictating things in midfield. He is happy to keep the ball moving, but always has one eye on Shomurodov’s runs ahead of him. 30 min Half an hour gone and neither team really has what they’re looking for so far. Nothing short of three points will do for DR Congo, while Uzbekistan need that and much more to overturn their deficit on goal difference. 29 min Sadiki still digs out a cross, but Wissa snatches at the volley and sends it well over. More positive stuff from DR Congo. 28 min DR Congo have been building pressure since play resumed but nothing to show for it as far as chances. 23 min We’re into our first hydration break. A perfect time to clip-and-save Barney Ronay’s paean to this tournament’s great contribution to world football. 21 min Sadiki is first into the book tonight, shown a yellow card for a high challenge on Shukurov. After a VAR review, the goal has been disallowed. Oh no! Mbuku was determined to have fouled an Uzbekistan defender with a wayward arm while making his run toward goal. Very, very harsh, but consistent with how that’s been called during this tournament. And it’s Nathanaël Mbuku with an absolute screamer from a step inside the area to level the score after 17 minutes. Mbuku takes one touch before firing past a frozen Nematov. 15 min DR Congo try to respond through Cipenga on the left, but the move stalls before Masuaku wins a fo
chineseTitle: 刚果民主共和国 vs 乌兹别克斯坦：2026 年世界杯 – 直播
chineseSummary: 每分钟报道：刚果民主共和国或乌兹别克斯坦能否赢得世界杯首场胜利？与 Bryan Graham 一起了解最新消息
chineseContent: 90+2 分钟（进球前不久，第四位裁判示意补时八分钟。）匕首来了！维萨在禁区外一脚弧线射门，越过守门员射入远角。刚果民主共和国现在肯定已经进入 32 强了！全队都在角旗下庆祝，并将身穿 20 号球衣的男子举到空中。多么场景啊！第 87 分钟，刚果民主共和国自半场结束以来一直控制着控球权和机会，并且在最后几分钟没有表现出放松的迹象。 85 分钟 有趣的是，就目前情况而言，刚果民主共和国的最后 32 场比赛将于周三在亚特兰大对阵……英格兰。第83分钟，刚果民主共和国也进行了最后一次换人，用乔里斯·卡延贝换下阿瑟·马苏亚库。第82分钟，乌兹别克斯坦队最后两名替补：伊戈尔·谢尔盖耶夫和贾姆希德·伊斯坎德罗夫替换阿克马尔·莫兹戈沃伊和贾洪吉尔·乌罗佐夫。第 79 分钟，菲斯顿·马耶勒 (Fiston Mayele) 完成了精彩的射门，埃利亚 (Elia) 的射门越过乌兹别克斯坦门将。他们还能再坚持 10 分钟来刷最后 32 场的门票吗？刚果民主共和国队在10分钟内打入第二球，淘汰赛已触手可及！ 75分钟，比赛还剩15分钟，刚果民主共和国以12-3的比分领先乌兹别克斯坦，射门得分2-1。 74分钟，乌兹别克斯坦队：奥斯顿·乌鲁诺夫换下阿博斯别克·法祖拉耶夫。 73 分钟 刚果民主共和国队三名换人：Ngal'ayel Mukau、Théo Bongonda 和 Meschack Elia 替换 Samuel Moutoussamy、Brian Cipenga 和 Nathanaël Mbuku。 70 分钟我们进入下半场比赛休息。当守门员向相反方向猛冲时，维萨冷静地将球射入右侧门柱。亚特兰大体育场看台上的刚果球迷欣喜若狂，他们已经扳平比分，淘汰赛梦想也很渺茫。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
